title: With student-loan payments resuming, these retailers could be affected the most as customers feel the squeeze

title: The TJX Companies, Inc. Announces Quarterly Common Stock Dividend
text: FRAMINGHAM, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TJX) today announced the declaration of a quarterly dividend on its common stock of $.3325 per share payable August 31, 2023, to shareholders of record on August 10, 2023. About The TJX Companies, Inc. The TJX Companies, Inc. is the leading off-price retailer of apparel and home fashions in the U.S. and worldwide.
